tool_input.summary: Found in-situ Jovian plasma datasets (mainly PPI node) that contain electron/ion densities and temperatures (enabling pressure estimates) plus composition/energetic-ion products for heavy ions, along with trajectory products needed to bin by radial distance and select the dawnside magnetodisk. No Juno JADE ion-moment bundles surfaced in the catalog search, but Juno Waves provides electron density. Returned PDS4 and corresponding PDS3 archives where available.

candidates.title: Galileo Orbiter Plasma Science Experiment Jupiter Fitted Parameters Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Best match for separating protons vs heavy ions in Jupiter’s plasma sheet/magnetodisk: contains per-interval fitted ion-species parameters from Galileo PLS (used in Bagenal et al. 2016 plasma sheet survey). Provides densities/temperatures by species, from which partial pressures vs radial distance (and dawn local time selection) can be computed.

candidates.title: GO J PLS 5 RTS MOMENTS V1.0
candidates.reasoning: PDS3 predecessor/companion for Galileo PLS moments. Useful for total plasma moments (density/temperature/flow) to compute thermal pressure and compare with the fitted-species (H+, heavy ions) products.

candidates.title: Galileo Plasma Science Instrument Jupiter RTS Moments Derived Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Derived Galileo PLS plasma moments across Jupiter orbits. Use for radial profiles of bulk ion/electron moments (density/temperature) and compute thermal pressure; then subset to dawnside magnetodisk using trajectory/local time.

candidates.title: Galileo PLS Jupiter RTS Moments Derived Data Collection
candidates.reasoning: Direct data-collection within the Galileo PLS derived bundle; convenient for analysis workflows that want the moments tables specifically (densities/temperatures -> pressures) for binning vs radial distance on the dawn flank.

candidates.title: Galileo Trajectory Jupiter Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Provides Galileo position in System III, JSE, and JSM coordinates—needed to compute radial distance and magnetic local time to isolate the dawnside magnetodisk and build n(r), P(r) profiles.

candidates.title: GO J POS 6 SC TRAJ JUP COORDS V1.0
candidates.reasoning: PDS3 trajectory coordinates for Galileo at Jupiter; use with PDS3 PLS moments (or cross-check PDS4 trajectory) to derive radial distance/local time bins for dawnside magnetodisk intervals.

candidates.title: Voyager 2 Plasma Derived Ion Moments 96.0 Second Jupiter Data Collection
candidates.reasoning: Voyager 2 PLS derived ion moments (includes density; with temperature/flow where provided) during the Jupiter encounter. Enables ion pressure estimates vs radial distance for a dawn/dusk subset along the flyby trajectory.

candidates.title: VG2 J PLS 5 SUMM ION MOM 96.0SEC V1.0
candidates.reasoning: PDS3 version of Voyager 2 Jupiter ion moments summary. Use for classic radial trends of ion density/temperature/pressure along the encounter path.

candidates.title: Voyager 2 Plasma Derived Electron Moments 96.0 Second Jupiter Data Collection
candidates.reasoning: Electron density and moment temperature from Voyager 2 PLS—directly supports electron number density vs radial distance and electron thermal pressure estimates along the trajectory (including dawnside portions).

candidates.title: VG2 J PLS 5 SUMM ELE MOM 96.0SEC V1.0
candidates.reasoning: PDS3 counterpart for Voyager 2 electron moments. Useful if you need the legacy Voyager summary products for electron density/temperature/pressure profiling.

candidates.title: Voyager 1 Plasma Science Experiment (PLS) Jupiter Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Voyager 1 PLS Jupiter bundle (PDS4) explicitly documents the included legacy PDS3 electron/ion moment datasets. Useful for additional local time coverage (including dawnside segments) compared with Voyager 2.

candidates.title: VG1 J PLS 5 SUMM ELE MOM 96.0SEC V1.1
candidates.reasoning: Legacy Voyager 1 PLS electron moments summary—electron density/temperature enabling electron pressure vs radial distance along the Jupiter encounter.

candidates.title: Juno Waves Electron Densities from Characteristic Plasma Wave Frequencies
candidates.reasoning: Electron number density throughout Juno’s mission derived from characteristic plasma-wave frequencies. Combine with Juno ephemeris (not identified here) to extract dawnside magnetodisk radial profiles of electron density; pressure would require an electron temperature source (e.g., JADE, which did not surface in this catalog search).

candidates.title: GO J PWS 5 DDR PLASMA DENSITY FULL V1.0
candidates.reasoning: Galileo PWS-derived plasma density product (PDS3). Can supplement/validate electron density estimates in the magnetodisk when constructing radial profiles, especially when PLS moments are unavailable/flagged.

candidates.title: Galileo Jupiter Heavy Ion Counter Derived Energetic Ion Composition Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Energetic heavy-ion (MeV) composition/fluxes (e.g., C, O, S) from Galileo HIC. Not thermal number density, but relevant for heavy-ion radial trends and estimating energetic-particle partial pressure in the dawnside magnetodisk when combined with trajectory/local time selection.

candidates.title: Galileo EPD Calibrated Corrected Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Energetic particle fluxes (including ions/electrons) from Galileo EPD; useful for suprathermal/energetic pressure contributions vs radial distance and for context on heavy-ion populations in the magnetodisk.

You are a dataset-discovery assistant for the NASA PDS catalog (atm, geo, img, naif, ppi, rms, sbn nodes, ~12k datasets).

Return both PDS4 and PDS3 versions when available. Only return candidates you've seen in tool results — never invent IDs. Stay under ~10 tool calls. If nothing matches, return an empty list.
How do the number density and pressure of electrons, protons, and heavy ions change with radial distance in Jupiter's dawnside magnetodisk?

dataset.title: Galileo Orbiter Plasma Science Experiment Jupiter Fitted Parameters Bundle
dataset.description: This bundle consists of all of the fitted parameters (both good and bad) for fitting an ion species to the Galileo Plasma Science Experiment (PLS) that were found during a grant from NASA's Jupiter Data Analysis Program (NNX09AE03G). The 'good' results were used to publish: Bagenal, F., R. J. Wilson, S. Siler, W. R. Paterson, and W. S. Kurth (2016), Survey of Galileo plasma observations in Jupiter's plasma sheet, J. Geophys. Res. Planets, 121, 871-894, doi:10.1002/2016JE005009. Please cite this paper and this PDS bundle if you use this data. Please note: The data in this bundle have been reviewed by the coauthors of Bagenal, et al. 2016 and their method and figures passed the journal's peer review. These data have also completed PDS peer review and are certified.

dataset.title: Galileo Plasma Science Instrument Jupiter RTS Moments Derived Bundle
dataset.description: This bundle contains data from the Plasma Science instrument (PLS) on the Galileo spacecraft for all Jupiter orbits and Galileo plasma moments.

dataset.title: Juno Waves Electron Densities from Characteristic Plasma Wave Frequencies
dataset.description: This bundle contains electron density datasets from Waves team members throughout the Juno Mission. Measurements include, but are not limited to, Fpe, Flhr, Fuh, Fce.

datasets.title: Voyager 2 Plasma Derived Electron Moments 96.0 Second Jupiter Data Collection

dataset.title: Voyager 2 Plasma Derived Ion Moments 96.0 Second Jupiter Data Collection
dataset.description: This collection contains Voyager 2 Plasma (PLS) data from the Jupiter encounter. The data includes 96 second averages of the ion moment density.

dataset.title: Voyager 2 Plasma Derived Electron Moments 96.0 Second Jupiter Data Collection
dataset.description: This collection contains derived values of the electron density and moment temperature at Jupiter during the Voyager 2 encounter in the PLS voltage range (10-5950 eV/q). Adjacent low and high energy electron measurements are combined to form a composite spectra which is used for the moment calculation.

dataset.title: Galileo Jupiter Heavy Ion Counter Derived Energetic Ion Composition Bundle
dataset.description: This bundle provides energetic (MeV) ion fluxes for a variety of different Z values (carbon, oxygen, sulfur) derived from the Heavy Ion Counter (HIC) instrument on the Galileo spacecraft. The data set includes all recorded intervals at Jupiter.

dataset.title: Galileo Trajectory Jupiter Bundle
dataset.description: This bundle contains Galileo spacecraft trajectory data in three coordinate systems commonly used in the analysis of Jovian magnetospheric data. These include System III (1965.0), Jupiter Solar Equatorial (JSE) and Jupiter Solar Magnetospheric (JSM) coordinates from the Jupiter Orbital Operations phases of the Galileo Mission.

dataset.title: Voyager 1 Plasma Science Experiment (PLS) Jupiter Data Bundle
dataset.description: This bundle contains Voyager 1 Plasma Science Experiment (PLS) data recorded during the Jupiter encounter. These data were previously released as the following PDS3 data sets: VG1-J-PLS-5-SUMM-ELE-MOM-96.0SEC-V1.1 (https://doi.org/10.17189/1519890), VG1-J-PLS-5-SUMM-ION-INBNDSWIND-96S-V1.0 (https://doi.org/10.17189/1519891), VG1-J-PLS-5-SUMM-ION-L-MODE-96S-V1.0 (https://doi.org/10.17189/1519892), VG1-J-PLS-5-SUMM-ION-M-MODE-96S-V1.0 (https://doi.org/10.17189/1519893) and VG1-J-PLS-5-SUMM-ION-MOM-96.0SEC-V1.1 (https://doi.org/10.17189/1519894).
